metadata.title: nu3 - Integral development for vulnerable families in Colombia
metadata.description: Colombian social organization that since 2005 works for the socioeconomic, emotional and nutritional development of vulnerable families. Present in Atlántico, Bolívar, Chocó, Guajira and Magdalena.

cta.transform: I want to transform a life today

slide1.title: We work for vulnerable families in Colombia
slide1.description: Since 2005 we promote the socioeconomic, emotional and nutritional development of the most vulnerable families, contributing to the eradication of hunger and the reduction of poverty.

slide2.subtitle: Integral Model
slide2.title: More than nutrition, life transformation
slide2.description: Our model works on three transversal axes: nutrition, education and income generation to promote the integral development of our beneficiaries and their families.

slide3.subtitle: Join the Change
slide3.title: We must give back to life what we have received
slide3.description: With your support, we have served more than 62,000 children and nutritionally recovered more than 15,400. Be part of this transformation.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Integral development for vulnerable families
about.description: We are a Social Organization that works for the socioeconomic, emotional and nutritional development of vulnerable families in Colombia. Since 2005, we have evolved from a nutrition program to an integral model that addresses the causes of poverty through three axes: nutrition, education and income generation.
about.missionText: To promote the emotional, nutritional and social development of vulnerable families, to contribute to the eradication of hunger and the reduction of poverty in Colombia.
about.visionText: To be a reference in the development of integral models of care for vulnerable families, ensuring that each beneficiary leads a dignified life with greater opportunities.
about.blockListItem: There are many ways to contribute to change

tabs.missionDescription: We promote the emotional, nutritional and social development of vulnerable families. Our integral model works on three transversal axes: nutrition, education and income generation, understanding that it is not enough to treat the food problem but to address the factors that influence poverty.
tabs.visionDescription: We are the only entity in Colombia that is part of SUN (Scaling Up Nutrition), an international institution whose goal is to achieve zero malnutrition worldwide by 2030. Our Integral Centers serve as the development engine of communities.
tabs.visionList2: Alliances with national government, ICBF and foundations
tabs.visionList4: Integral care: micro-trafficking, violence, community cohesion
tabs.historyDescription: Founded in 2005 by Mónica Schraer and Francis Zylberblum, barranquilleras of Jewish roots, nu3 began as Nutrir Barranquilla with 35 children in Barrio Santa María. Realizing that treating malnutrition was not enough, we renewed our model to address the causes of poverty. From Nutrir we became nu3, integrating nutrition with education and income generation. By 2016 we were already impacting 26,000 families, and today we are present in Atlántico, Bolívar, Chocó, Guajira and Magdalena.

catering.title: Menu3 - Social Catering

model360.title: Our 360 Intervention Model
model360.subtitle: Transforming communities comprehensively
model360.description: The nu3 360 intervention model transforms communities by working with every family member: children, expectant mothers, and elderly adults. From our Integral Centers, we activate pathways in nutrition, education, and income generation. It is a proven, measurable, replicable model ready to be franchised nationally and internationally.

overview.title: Real impact
overview.description: Each testimonial represents a transformed life. Discover the stories of those who have been part of our foundation.

testimonial1.text: This year, on my birthday, I exchanged gifts for a bonu3 celebration. Instead of receiving things, my friends and family donated to nu3, and together we celebrated by bringing hope to those who need it most. It was the most beautiful gift I could receive.
testimonial1.name: María Luna Jaramillo

testimonial2.text: I am very grateful to nu3 because I have received so much support. I am very happy to know that I have the support of people who give me knowledge and allow me to have a better future. Thanks to nu3 for helping my family with their well-being.
testimonial2.name: Young beneficiary

testimonial3.text: nu3 came into my life when I needed it most. Thanks to their programs, my son was able to recover his nutrition and today he is healthy and happy. The team accompanied us with much love and professionalism.
testimonial3.name: Beneficiary mother

testimonial4.text: Being a nu3 sponsor has allowed me to see firsthand how my contribution transforms lives. Each visit to the centers fills me with hope and confirms that we are making a difference.
testimonial4.name: nu3 Sponsor

testimonial5.text: Thanks to nu3's training program, I now have the tools to better care for my family. I learned about nutrition, breastfeeding, and my children's development.
testimonial5.name: Participant mother

meta.title: FAQ - nu3 Foundation
meta.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our programs, donations, and volunteering.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: FAQ
faqPage.heading: Answers to your questions
faqPage.description: Here you'll find information about our programs, how to donate, and how to participate.

general.title: About nu3
general.a1: nu3 is a Colombian foundation with over 20 years of experience transforming lives through nutrition, education, and comprehensive support for vulnerable families.
general.a2: Our programs operate mainly in Bogotá and Cundinamarca, with presence in vulnerable communities in the region.
general.a3: We are funded through individual donations, sponsorships, corporate partnerships, and the operation of our social productive units.
general.q4: How can I learn more about your work?
general.a4: You can follow us on social media, subscribe to our newsletter, or contact us directly for a visit to our centers.

donations.title: Donations
donations.q1: How can I make a donation?
donations.a1: You can donate through our website, bank transfer, or in person at our centers. We accept one-time or recurring donations.
donations.a2: Yes, nu3 is registered as a non-profit organization and donations may be tax-deductible according to Colombian law.
donations.a3: Yes, we receive donations of non-perishable food, clothing in good condition, and other goods through our productive units.
donations.q4: How do I know my donation is used correctly?
donations.a4: We publish annual transparency reports and send periodic updates to our donors about the impact of their contributions.

programs.title: Programs
programs.a1: Our programs are aimed at families in vulnerable conditions, especially children, pregnant/nursing mothers, and elderly adults.
programs.a2: We work with community leaders and conduct a social and nutritional diagnostic process to identify those who need the most support.
programs.a3: It includes nutritional assessment, food delivery, healthy habits education, psychosocial support, and continuous follow-up.
programs.a4: The time varies according to each family's needs, but we seek sustained support until achieving nutritional autonomy.

volunteer.title: Volunteering
volunteer.a1: You can sign up through our contact page. We're looking for committed people with at least 4 hours of weekly availability.
volunteer.q2: What type of volunteers do you need?
volunteer.a2: We're looking for health professionals, educators, communicators, administrators, and anyone willing to contribute their time and talent.
volunteer.a3: Yes, all volunteers receive an induction about our mission, values, and protocols for working with vulnerable communities.
volunteer.a4: Yes, we have remote volunteering opportunities in areas like communications, design, social media management, and more.

contact.subtitle: More questions?
contact.title: We're here to help
contact.description: If you didn't find the answer you were looking for, don't hesitate to contact us.
contact.a1: You can write to us at comunicaciones@nu3.org.co, call us at +57 318 330 9385, or visit us at Cra. 9E #137-21, Suroccidente, Barranquilla.
contact.a2: Our hours are Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM. We also respond to messages on social media.

programa-huertas-soacha.title: Productive Gardens Program in Soacha

capacitacion-madres.title: Training for Pregnant and Breastfeeding Mothers
capacitacion-madres.description: Comprehensive training program in nutrition, prenatal care, and breastfeeding for 800 mothers.

alianza-empresarial-2024.title: Business Alliance 2024
alianza-empresarial-2024.description: Agreement with partner companies to expand the coverage of our programs nationwide.

recuperacion-nutricional.title: Nutritional Recovery Program
recuperacion-nutricional.description: Specialized intervention for children with acute malnutrition in rural communities of Cundinamarca.

unidad-productiva-panaderia.title: Social Bakery Productive Unit
unidad-productiva-panaderia.description: Establishment of a social bakery that generates employment for beneficiary mothers and reinvests in social programs.

content.paragraph1: This project represents one of our most significant efforts to transform the living conditions of the most vulnerable families. Through a comprehensive approach, we combine nutrition, education, and social support.
content.paragraph2: The main objective is to generate a sustainable impact that transcends direct intervention, empowering communities to maintain and improve their well-being autonomously.

sidebar.supportDescription: Your donation allows us to continue transforming lives through projects like this.

importancia-nutricion-infantil.title: The importance of nutrition in the first years of life
importancia-nutricion-infantil.excerpt: Discover why the first 1000 days are crucial for children's cognitive and physical development, and how proper nutrition makes a difference.

lactancia-materna-beneficios.title: Breastfeeding: benefits for mom and baby
lactancia-materna-beneficios.excerpt: Breast milk is the best food for newborns. Learn about all the benefits it provides to both the baby and the nursing mother.

huertas-urbanas-seguridad-alimentaria.excerpt: Urban gardens have become an effective alternative to ensure access to fresh and nutritious food in vulnerable communities.

historia-transformacion-familia-martinez.title: Transformation story: The Martínez family
historia-transformacion-familia-martinez.excerpt: Learn how nu3's program helped the Martínez family overcome childhood malnutrition and transform their quality of life.

alianza-empresa-xyz.title: New partnership with Company XYZ to expand our impact
alianza-empresa-xyz.excerpt: We are pleased to announce our new strategic partnership that will allow us to benefit more than 500 additional families this year.

recetas-nutritivas-economicas.title: 10 nutritious and affordable recipes for the whole family
recetas-nutritivas-economicas.excerpt: Preparing healthy meals doesn't have to be expensive. We share easy, nutritious, and affordable recipes to feed your family.

blogDetails.authorBio: Professional with over 10 years of experience in community nutrition and food security programs.

content.paragraph1: Proper nutrition during the first years of life is essential for children's physical, cognitive, and emotional development. During this critical period, the brain develops at an accelerated pace, and a balanced diet provides the essential nutrients for this process.
content.paragraph2: Scientific studies have shown that children who receive adequate nutrition in their early years have better academic performance, greater concentration ability, and lower risk of developing chronic diseases in adulthood.
content.quote: An investment in child nutrition is an investment in the future of an entire generation.
content.paragraph3: At nu3, we work with vulnerable families to ensure children receive the nutrients they need during this crucial stage of their development.
content.paragraph4: Through our comprehensive programs, we not only provide nutritious food but also educate families about healthy eating habits they can maintain long-term.

meta.title: Our Team - nu3 Foundation
meta.description: Meet the team of professionals dedicated to transforming lives in Colombia.

joinUs.title: Would you like to join our team?
joinUs.description: We are looking for people passionate about nutrition and the well-being of Colombian families.

bio.paragraph1: Dedicated professional with extensive experience in the social and nutrition sector. Their commitment to nu3's mission has been fundamental to the growth and success of our programs.
bio.paragraph2: With high-level academic training and practical experience in vulnerable communities, they bring a comprehensive vision that combines technical knowledge with the social sensitivity required for this work.
bio.paragraph3: Their leadership has been key in implementing innovative initiatives that have benefited thousands of families in Colombia.

content.paragraph1: Our comprehensive approach combines the delivery of essential nutrients with education and continuous support, ensuring sustainable results for the families we serve.
content.paragraph2: We work in collaboration with local communities, community leaders, and partner organizations to maximize the impact of each intervention and ensure that beneficiaries receive quality care.

whyJoin.subtitle: Why join us

whyJoin.description: Every contribution and every action counts. Discover how you can be part of the change.

faq.a1: You can sign up as a volunteer through our contact page. We're looking for people committed to the nutrition and well-being of Colombian families.
faq.a2: Our programs operate mainly in Bogotá and its surroundings, with presence in vulnerable communities of Cundinamarca.
faq.a3: We conduct a community identification process together with local leaders, prioritizing families in nutritional vulnerability.
faq.a4: Yes, we receive donations of non-perishable food, clothing, and other goods through our productive units like Outletnu3.
